reference: THE SEARCH USUALLY PRODUCED A LARGE AND VARIED YIELD THIS IS FUNNY SAID PETER PIGEONCOTE TO HIS WIFE SOME HALF HOUR AFTER THEIR CONVERSATION HERE'S A TELEGRAM FROM WILFRID SAYING HE'S PASSING THROUGH HERE IN HIS MOTOR AND WOULD LIKE TO STOP AND PAY US HIS RESPECTS
text: The search usually produced a large and varied yield. This is funny, said Peter Pigeonco to his wife some half hour after their conversation. Here's a telegram from Wilfred, saying, He's passing through here in his motor and would like to stop and pay us his respects.
